allow: PowerShell(foreach \($c in @\('claude','grok','aas','node','python','py'\)\) { $cmd = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { "{0,-8} -> {1} [{2}]" -f $c, $cmd.Source, $cmd.CommandType } else { "{0,-8} -> NOT FOUND" -f $c } })

PowerShell($root='D:\\GitHub\\agent_code_IDLE\\vscode-extension'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$root\\src","$root\\pybridge","$root\\media\\vendor" | Out-Null; $ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; try { Invoke-WebRequest 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked@12.0.0/marked.min.js' -OutFile "$root\\media\\vendor\\marked.min.js" -ErrorAction Stop; Invoke-WebRequest 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/dompurify@3.0.9/dist/purify.min.js' -OutFile "$root\\media\\vendor\\purify.min.js" -ErrorAction Stop; "vendor downloaded:"; Get-ChildItem "$root\\media\\vendor" | Select-Object Name,Length | Format-Table -AutoSize } catch { "DOWNLOAD FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(python -c "import importlib.util as u; mods=['fastapi','uvicorn','yaml','ruamel.yaml','winpty']; [print\(f'{m}: {\\"OK\\" if u.find_spec\(m\) else \\"MISSING\\"}'\) for m in mods]"; "py launcher:"; \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath python -ArgumentList @\('D:\\GitHub\\agent_code_IDLE\\vscode-extension\\pybridge\\server.py','--app-root','D:\\GitHub\\agent_code_IDLE\\app','--host','127.0.0.1','--port','5199'\) -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\agentui_out.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\agentui_err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; foreach \($u in @\('/api/projects','/','/styles.css','/app.js'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:5199$u" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "GET $u -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \(len $\($r.Content.Length\)\)" } catch { "GET $u FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "--- stdout ---"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\agentui_out.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "--- stderr tail ---"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\agentui_err.log" -Tail 8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
